summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Chrono DMI v2 theme toggle (dark/light mode) and Poppins font features. All 12 test cases passed. Theme toggle works correctly on login page, management sidebar, and production interventions page. Theme persists in localStorage. Poppins font is properly loaded from Google Fonts CDN. Both login flows (management email/password and production PIN) work correctly.
passed_tests: Theme toggle button exists on login page (data-testid='login-theme-toggle')
Theme toggle button exists in management sidebar (data-testid='theme-toggle')
Theme toggle button exists on production interventions page (data-testid='production-theme-toggle')
Clicking theme toggle switches between dark and light mode (html class 'dark-mode' added/removed)
Theme preference persists in localStorage key 'cdmi-theme' (values: 'dark' or 'light')
Dark mode is default when localStorage is empty
Poppins font is loaded from Google Fonts CDN and applied to body (font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif)
All 7 management sidebar navigation items work (Interventions, Cabinets, Produits, Commandes, Consommation, Employes, Mouvements)
Dark mode: content area has dark background (rgb(12, 14, 20))
Light mode: content area has light background (rgb(244, 245, 249))
Both modes: sidebar stays dark (rgb(17, 19, 32) in dark mode, rgb(30, 32, 48) in light mode)
critical_code_review_comments: ThemeService implementation is clean and follows Angular best practices with BehaviorSubject
PrimeNG darkModeSelector configuration is correct in app.config.ts
CSS variables for both light and dark themes are well-organized in styles.scss
Production login page does not have a theme toggle button - this may be intentional for simplicity on touch devices
context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme toggle feature is fully functional. Dark mode is default. Theme persists in localStorage('cdmi-theme'). Poppins font is loaded from Google Fonts CDN. All login flows work. The production login page intentionally does not have a theme toggle - only the main login, management sidebar, and production interventions page have theme toggles.

theme_toggle.default: dark mode when localStorage is empty

poppins_font.applied_to: body and PrimeNG components via styles.scss
